name: Rob Roy
recipeInstructions:
STRAIGHT UP:
1. Fill a mixing glass with cracked ice.
2. Add Scotch and sweet vermouth to the mixing glass.
3. Stir until well combined.
4. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.
5. Garnish with a cherry.
ON THE ROCKS:
1. Fill a rocks glass with ice cubes.
2. Add Scotch and sweet vermouth to the rocks glass.
3. Stir until well combined.
4. Garnish with a cherry.
